gauge.name: Trinity River near Rosser

impacts.statement: Widespread major flooding is expected along the river. The levees will overflow and farm land will be inundated. Rural roads near the river will be underwater.
Water will be approaching the top of the lowest area of the levee on the ellis county side of the river.
Major flooding is expected on farm and ranch lands near the river.
Moderate flooding is expected within the levees.
Moderate flooding is expected along the river but within the levees.
Minor to moderate flooding of low areas and roads within the levees is expected.
Minor flooding of farm and ranch land is expected near the river. A few rural roads may be flooded.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States

Observations courtesy of U.S. Army Corps of Engineers

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
